capabilities.name: Technician availability check
capabilities.verify: check_technician_availability RPC/skill (migration 20260707213000): overlap check against non-cancelled service_visits, p_exclude_visit_id for reschedules
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07 via gateway: available=true before scheduling SO-00001, available=false with conflict payload after.

capabilities.name: Signature/photo proof
capabilities.verify: record_visit_proof RPC/skill writes signature_url + signed_by + signed_at + proof_photos (new jsonb column) + technician_notes append (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: signature URL, signer name, 2 photos and notes persisted on visit bd93c5a8.

capabilities.name: Material stock deduction
capabilities.verify: emit_service_order_event emits stock.movement per material line on completion; consumer apply_stock_movement_event(jsonb) now accepts qty_delta|quantity_delta|quantity|qty (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 LIVE verified on dev 2026-07-07: completing SO-00001 (2× material w/ product) decremented products.stock_quantity 20→18 and stock_quants by -2. Two drift bugs fixed in-round: (1) dev still ran the pre-20260614010000 emitter (backdated migration silently skipped); (2) the live consumer only read qty_delta while emitters (incl. record_pos_sale_v2) send quantity — every deduction platform-wide was a silent no-op.

capabilities.name: Actual visit time tracking
capabilities.verify: record_visit_time RPC/skill: start/stop clock writes actual_start/actual_end, bubbles order to in_progress, stamps first_response_at (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: clock-in/out on visit bd93c5a8 with duration returned.

capabilities.name: Service SLA targets
capabilities.verify: manage_service_sla RPC/skill: set (response/resolution hours from created_at), status (response_met/resolution_met), list_breaches; sla_response_due/sla_resolution_due/first_response_at columns (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: set 4h/48h on SO-00001; after clock-in + completion status returned response_met=true, resolution_met=true.

capabilities.name: Service package templates
capabilities.verify: service_packages table + manage_service_package RPC/skill (create/update/list/get/delete/apply); apply copies lines onto the order, total recomputes via existing trigger (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: AC Service Package (labor+material) applied to SO-00001, 2 lines added, order_total 2400.

capabilities.name: Recurring service orders
capabilities.verify: recurrence_rule/recurrence_until/next_occurrence_at/parent_order_id columns + manage_recurring_service_order RPC/skill (set/clear/list/generate) + service-recurring-orders pg_cron daily 05:10 (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: monthly rule set on SO-00001, generate spawned draft child 443a436c with cloned lines/links. Cron registered on dev.

capabilities.name: Service contract linking
capabilities.verify: link_service_order RPC/skill sets contract_id/project_id/deal_id (existing columns) with existence validation + unlink (migration 20260707213000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: SO-00001 linked to contract 626b6c00. Recurring children inherit links.
